name: The Lighthouse Legacy
overview: The Lighthouse Legacy is a podcast created by Bethany Institutions, Bangalore to honour the community that has grown within its walls for the past 60 years. This student-run venture offers an inside look into the lives of the teachers, alumni and staff that have been impacted in Bethany as it celebrates its diamond jubilee year!

trailers.title: S1 E1: Mr. Saroop Oommen | The Lighthouse Legacy Podcast
